Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Floor Factory's motion to compel production of documents is denied as defendant has agreed to produce the personnel files of plaintiffs and the exemplars of non-compete agreements and has previously agreed to produce responsive documents. Unless the parties have already done so, defendant shall prepare the stipulation that the documents produced in the Washington action are responsive to plaintiff's requests in California and that P may use such documents as if they were produced in this case. Furthermore, D shall verify that all responsive information to plaintiff's requests has been provided. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
